text: OMG this jacket is STUNNING! Where did you find it?? \ud83d\ude0d

Same! That estate sale on Flat Shoals had a line out the door before it even opened. Did you get in?
We post the weekend estate sale map every Thursday! DM us and we'll add you to the list.
Pro tip: go on the last day, everything is half off. Best way to score.
Three sales this weekend and I got out-bid on every single brass lamp. Brutal.
Same find at the Decatur sale! After the early birds cleared out the back room was a goldmine.
Confirmed the church rummage sale on Glenwood is stacked this year too. Go early.
Found the same style cardigan at the Kirkwood sale too. Wool, perfect condition, six bucks.
Classic mid-century knit. Easy mend on the cuff and it's good for another 30 years.
Found a similar handmade pair at the maker's market! Booth in the back corner, easy to miss.
Same maker did my favorite brass pair! These ATL artists are unmatched.
Hey everyone! Restock drops Friday and we'll have the moons back in three new glazes. Thanks for the love!
Styling thrifted furniture in a small apartment is genuinely an art. Hoping for a full tour.
Definitely a layout puzzle when everything's secondhand and no two pieces match. But it works!
Scored the same wash of vintage Levi's at the bins this weekend! Profile is full of bin tips. Go dig.
That looks like the same era as a pair I found last month. Same red tab placement?
Thank you for posting this. Choosing secondhand first really does add up. Real change.
This is honestly the most inspiring thrift-only feed in the city. Hope more people see it.
Same incredible haul day here. Hit four stores, all worth it. Go this weekend.
Restock supposedly happened but the racks were picked clean by noon. Anyone else miss it?
We hear you! Second restock is going out Thursday morning. Thanks for your patience!
Found the exact same enamel pitcher at the Grant Park sale too. These are everywhere right now!
These vintage pieces are so collectible right now. You'll want to grab them before resellers do.
